validation.positive_acceptance_result: The full release path is tested only after explicit evidence, internal draft, advisor approval and compliance release gates.
validation.negative_acceptance_result: Advisor-only, upload-only, admin, cross-tenant, missing evidence, missing rationale, missing audit, missing export approval and internal payload cases remain fail-closed.

bold_cleanup_recommendations: Turn this proof plan into a reusable release-boundary test helper so every future workflow uses the same negative cases.
Forbid direct writes of clientVisible true outside the canonical compliance_release command path.
Add a source scan for generic 'Approved' labels on release-adjacent components and require context-specific labels.
